name: Aura Minerals Inc.
description: Aura Minerals Inc. is a mid-tier gold and copper production company focused on the development and operation of gold and base metal projects in the Americas. The company's portfolio includes the San Andres gold mine in Honduras, the Ernesto/Pau-a-Pique gold mine in Brazil, and the Aranzazu copper-gold-silver mine in Mexico. Aura Minerals is committed to sustainable mining practices and aims to grow its production profile through the advancement of its exploration projects and strategic acquisitions in mining-friendly jurisdictions.
